triageFlags.title: Applicant Age Exceeds Maximum Allowable
triageFlags.description: The applicant's age is unrealistically high and likely erroneous.
triageFlags.recommendation: Verify the applicant's age and correct the data entry error.
triageFlags.reasoning: The age of 120 years is highly unusual and likely a data entry error. This must be corrected to ensure accurate underwriting.

triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV ratio using the provided financial data and ensure it complies with policy limits.
triageFlags.reasoning: The LTV ratio is a critical metric for assessing the financial structure of the loan. It is calculated as (Total Advance) / (Vehicle Trade Price). This value is missing and must be computed to ensure compliance with the policy.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratio is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI ratio using the provided financial data and ensure it complies with policy limits.
triageFlags.reasoning: The DTI ratio is essential for evaluating the applicant's affordability. It is calculated as (Total Monthly Credit Commitments + Proposed Monthly Instalment) / Verified Net Monthly Income. This value is missing and must be computed to ensure compliance with the policy.

triageFlags.title: Total Deposit Not Calculated
triageFlags.expectedValue: Sum of Cash Deposit and Part Exchange Value
triageFlags.description: The total deposit is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the total deposit and ensure it meets the minimum requirements as per policy.
triageFlags.reasoning: The total deposit is a key component in determining the financial structure of the loan. It should be the sum of the cash deposit and the part exchange value. This value is missing and must be computed to ensure compliance with the policy.

triageFlags.title: Applicant Age Exceeds Maximum Allowable
triageFlags.description: The applicant's age is unrealistically high and likely a data entry error.
triageFlags.recommendation: Verify the applicant's age and correct the data entry error.
triageFlags.reasoning: The age of 120 years is highly unusual and likely a mistake. This needs to be corrected to ensure accurate assessment.

triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value ratio is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV ratio using the provided financial data and compare it against policy limits.
triageFlags.reasoning: The LTV ratio is a critical metric for assessing the financial risk of the loan. It must be calculated and compared to the policy thresholds for the applicant's credit tier.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio Not Calculated
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income ratio is not provided in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI ratio using the provided financial data and compare it against policy thresholds.
triageFlags.reasoning: The DTI ratio is essential for determining the affordability of the loan for the applicant. It must be calculated and assessed against the policy limits for the applicant's credit tier.

content.reasoning: The analysis identified critical and medium-severity issues in the proposal. The applicant's age is unrealistically high, suggesting a data entry error that must be corrected. Additionally, the Loan-to-Value (LTV) and Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios, crucial for risk assessment, are not calculated in the proposal, necessitating immediate attention to ensure compliance with underwriting policies.
